prompt: generate video conferencing interface with multiple participant windows
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a video conferencing interface. It should feature multiple participant video windows arranged in a grid or gallery view, with each window displaying a different person. Standard interface controls, such as mute, video, and chat buttons, should be present at the bottom of the screen.
objects: Video windows arranged in a grid or gallery view
Different people shown in each video window
Mute button at the bottom of the screen
Video button at the bottom of the screen
Chat button at the bottom of the screen
